sglang.title: fix self.enable_kv_cache_events
sglang.author: narutolhy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
server_args.kv_events_config defaults to None.
The original assignment:
self.enable_kv_cache_events = server_args.kv_events_config and tp_rank == 0
propagates None into self.enable_kv_cache_events when kv_events_config is None, because Python’s and returns the first falsy operand (None).

vllm.title: Stop mergify from keeping stale PRs alive
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prevents the following vicious cycle:

PR goes stale and stale bot labels it stale
Mergify sees this activity and checks its rules. It will most likely:

Add needs-rebase
Add a new label which didn't exist when the PR was opened


Stale bot now marks the PR as unstale keeping it alive another 3 mont

vllm.title: Support expert parallel in Transformers backend
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR solves 2 problems that enables expert parallel in the Transformers backend:

Ensures that the dtypes of topk_ids (torch.int32) and topk_weights (torch.float32) match what is expected from FusedMoE.select_experts
Gathers the topk_ids which are passed directly from Transformers as is done for
